name: Orange Juice Fizz:
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large non-metal pitcher, combine the thawed orange juice concentrate, cold water, and orange-flavored liqueur (if using). Mix well.
2. Just before serving, slowly add the club soda to the mixture. Stir gently to blend.
3. Serve over ice. Garnish with orange slices if desired.
4. Makes 8 1/2 cups servings.
5. Per serving: calories 100; protein 1g; carbs 18g; fiber 0g; fat 0g; sodium 15 mg; potassium 190 mg.
6. Exchanges: 1 fruit, one fat.
